mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM product WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
SELECT * FROM product ORDER BY RAND()

SELECT p.*, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS sales FROM product p LEFT JOIN order_item oi ON p.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.id AND o.status = 2 -- 只统计已完成订单的销量（将条件移到ON子句中） GROUP BY p.id ORDER BY p.id
